question: In New York City, which elementary schools appear in the top five by environment category score in at least three of the four school years ending in the year (within 2005-2010) that has the highest suicide death rate for all persons? List the school names in alphabetical order separated by `, `. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
answer: P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence, P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary
